sourcesContent: import {BrowserRouter,Routes,Route} from 'react-router-dom';import Welcome from './pages/Welcome';import Login from './pages/Login';import Signup from './pages/Signup';import Account from './pages/Account';export default function App(){return(<BrowserRouter><Routes><Route path='/' element={<Welcome/>}/><Route path='/login' element={<Login/>}/><Route path='/signup' element={<Signup/>}/><Route path='/account' element={<Account/>}/></Routes></BrowserRouter>);}
